song.title: Shout to the North
song.author: Martin Smith
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G D C Men of faith, rise up and sing . G D C Of the great and glorious King . G D C You are strong when you feel weak, . G D C In your brokenness, complete.
[C] .G C D Shout to the North and the South. .G C D Sing to the East and the West. .G C D Jesus is Savior to all, .C D G Lord of heaven and earth.
[V2] Rise up women of the truth Stand and sing to broken hearts Who can know the healing power Of our glorious King of love?
[B] .Em C We’ve been through fire, we’ve been through rain. .Em C We’ve been refined by the pow’r of His name .Em C We’ve fallen deeper in love with You. . G/B Dsus D You’ve burned the truth on our lips.
[V3] Rise up church with broken wings; Fill this place with songs again Of our God who reigns on high. By His grace again we’ll fly.
